category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular IoT) exported from China to Norway. Norway is NOT an EU member state but IS an EEA member; the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU) applies in Norway via the EEA Agreement and is enforced by Nkom (Nasjonal kommunikasjonsmyndighet — Norwegian Communications Authority). CE marking is mandatory as in the EU. Electrical safety is overseen by DSB (Direktoratet for samfunnssikkerhet og beredskap). Norway has its own customs regime (Tolldirektoratet) despite EEA membership — goods crossing from EU to Norway go through customs.

title.en: China-to-Norway Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入挪威：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入挪威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Norwegian market requirements under the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU), adopted into Norwegian law via the EEA Agreement and enforced by Nkom (Nasjonal kommunikasjonsmyndighet — Norwegian Communications Authority). Covers CE marking, radio performance (EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 with 5 GHz DFS/LBT — Nkom is a documented DFS enforcer), EMC (EN 301 489 series), electrical safety (EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11, 230 V/50 Hz, plug C/F Schuko, DSB oversight), cybersecurity (RED Art. 3.3 mandatory from 1 August 2025 via EN 18031; EU CRA trajectory aligned with Norwegian DSB regulatory direction), EEA/EU Authorised Representative, Norwegian-language labelling, WEEE registration via Retur-El, and Norwegian customs (Tolldirektoratet) procedures.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与挪威市场要求（依据欧盟无线设备指令RED 2014/53/EU，通过欧洲经济区协议纳入挪威法律，由Nkom——挪威通信管理局——在国内执行）的差距对照。涵盖CE标志、无线电性能（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893，含5 GHz DFS/LBT——Nkom是有据可查的DFS执法机构）、电磁兼容（EN 301 489系列）、电气安全（EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V/50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插头，DSB监管）、网络安全（RED第3.3条，2025年8月1日起通过EN 18031强制执行；欧盟CRA走向与挪威DSB监管方向一致）、EEA/欧盟授权代表、挪威语标签、通过Retur-El进行WEEE注册及挪威海关（Tolldirektoratet）手续。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與挪威市場要求（依據歐盟無線設備指令RED 2014/53/EU，通過歐洲經濟區協議納入挪威法律，由Nkom——挪威通訊管理局——在國內執行）的差距對照。涵蓋CE標誌、無線電性能（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893，含5 GHz DFS/LBT——Nkom是有據可查的DFS執法機構）、電磁相容（EN 301 489系列）、電氣安全（EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V/50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插頭，DSB監管）、網路安全（RED第3.3條，2025年8月1日起通過EN 18031強制執行；歐盟CRA走向與挪威DSB監管方向一致）、EEA/歐盟授權代表、挪威語標籤、通過Retur-El進行WEEE登記及挪威海關（Tolldirektoratet）手續。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Norwegian and EEA law, harmonised standards, Nkom guidance, and applicable customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行挪威及欧洲经济区法律、协调标准、Nkom指导意见及适用的海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行挪威及歐洲經濟區法律、協調標準、Nkom指導意見及適用的海關要求。

answer_first.en: Norway is an EEA member — not an EU member — but the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU) applies in Norway via the EEA Agreement, and CE marking is mandatory, enforced by Nkom (Norwegian Communications Authority). Key gaps versus Chinese SRRC/CCC include: radio performance testing to EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 (with mandatory 5 GHz DFS — Nkom actively enforces DFS violations), EMC to EN 301 489 series, electrical safety to EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 (230 V/50 Hz, plug type C/F Schuko, DSB oversight), cybersecurity under RED Art. 3.3(d)–(f) via EN 18031 (mandatory from 1 August 2025), EEA/EU Authorised Representative (an EU AR must also cover Norway or a separate Norway EEA AR must be appointed), Norwegian-language labelling for consumer products, WEEE registration via Retur-El, and Norwegian customs clearance via Tolldirektoratet despite EEA membership. CCC and FCC are not recognised in Norway.
answer_first.zh: 挪威是欧洲经济区成员——而非欧盟成员——但欧盟无线设备指令（RED 2014/53/EU）通过欧洲经济区协议在挪威适用，CE标志为强制要求，由Nkom（挪威通信管理局）执行。与中国SRRC/CCC相比，主要差距包括：按EN 300 328 / EN 301 893进行无线电性能检测（接入点须强制符合5 GHz DFS要求——Nkom积极执法处理DFS违规）、按EN 301 489系列进行电磁兼容检测、按EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11进行电气安全检测（230 V/50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插头，DSB监管）、通过EN 18031履行RED第3.3(d)–(f)条网络安全义务（2025年8月1日起强制执行）、委任EEA/欧盟授权代表（欧盟授权代表须同时覆盖挪威，或须另行委任挪威EEA代表）、提供消费品挪威语标签、通过Retur-El进行WEEE注册，以及尽管拥有欧洲经济区成员身份仍须通过Tolldirektoratet完成挪威海关通关。CCC和FCC在挪威不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 挪威是歐洲經濟區成員——而非歐盟成員——但歐盟無線設備指令（RED 2014/53/EU）通過歐洲經濟區協議在挪威適用，CE標誌為強制要求，由Nkom（挪威通訊管理局）執行。與中國SRRC/CCC相比，主要差距包括：按EN 300 328 / EN 301 893進行無線電性能檢測（接入點須強制符合5 GHz DFS要求——Nkom積極執法處理DFS違規）、按EN 301 489系列進行電磁相容檢測、按EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11進行電氣安全檢測（230 V/50 Hz，C/F型Schuko插頭，DSB監管）、通過EN 18031履行RED第3.3(d)–(f)條網路安全義務（2025年8月1日起強制執行）、委任EEA/歐盟授權代表（歐盟授權代表須同時覆蓋挪威，或須另行委任挪威EEA代表）、提供消費品挪威語標籤、通過Retur-El進行WEEE登記，以及儘管擁有歐洲經濟區成員身份仍須通過Tolldirektoratet完成挪威海關通關。CCC和FCC在挪威不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Nkom, EUR-Lex, ETSI, DSB, and Lovdata are preferred primary sources.
